eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 10:18 PM on OCT 14, 2019 Effective until 8:18 AM OCT 15, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  M.C.S.O. is looking for Female, Judy Kay Tanzer,  last seen in the area of Willowcreek Circle located in Sun City, Arizona, driving a Blue, Green 2010 Honda C.R.V., Arizona License C.L.W.2091. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 911.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
